task: Open the form 8843 for tax year 2022.
final_result_response: The Form 8843 for tax year 2022 has been successfully opened. The PDF is displayed in the browser at the URL `https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-prior/f8843--2022.pdf`. The form is a 4-page document titled "Statement for Exempt Individuals and Individuals With a Medical Condition" for tax year 2022, used by alien individuals to explain excluded days of presence in the U.S. for the substantial presence test.
